source.body:
# Pack Epic: PACK 7 - Release Identity And Packaging Hardening

Status: proposed pack epic for `0.10.6.x` replay from `v0.10.6`.

## CEO outcome

Operators can tell exactly what candidate is running and ship or roll back with confidence.

## CTO outcome

Source, Docker image, Helm chart, dashboard version, CI, and hardening metadata identify the same candidate and avoid release-only drift.

## User outcome

Self-hosted and production operators see coherent version/package behavior instead of mixed source/runtime identity.

## Included raw issues / PRs

- #349
- release/provenance/hardening scope from #348/#331

## Reusable committed code references

Base: `v0.10.6^{}` = `6da3abb` / `6da3abb92fd50c1939f1c0ecfb85246db364e427`

Lineage head used for reusable committed work: `codex/release-0.10.6.2.1` = `e8cd9e7` / `e8cd9e73aa9967cd0ebb9f2ff3a0d701b9684106`

Reusable commits:
- `1707445`
- `4bff1e4`
- `43ed25f`
- `edefff3`
- `dbb42f7`

Main file surfaces:
- `VERSION`
- `RELEASE_NOTES.md`
- `deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml`
- `deploy/helm/charts/vexa/Chart.yaml`
- `deploy/helm/charts/vexa/templates/_helpers.tpl`
- `services/dashboard/scripts/assert-release-version.js`
- `services/dashboard/scripts/generate-release-version.js`
- `services/dashboard/src/lib/release-version.ts`
- `services/meeting-api/meeting_api/security_headers.py`
- `service Dockerfiles and dependency manifests touched by hardening commits`

## Explicitly out of scope

- Current uncommitted product changes in the local worktree are excluded from this pack.
- Dead release evidence folders are excluded as source truth.
- Deprecated harness evidence is excluded; reusable checks must live in product tests or dedicated skills.
- The removed realtime transcript regression pack is not replay scope here.

## Blast radius

Release provenance, Docker images, Helm chart SemVer/appVersion, dashboard version display, dependency floors, security headers, CI workflows.

## Data / schema / API / public-contract decisions

No product behavior pack is accepted by this pack alone; this pack verifies candidate identity, packaging, and hardening once product packs exist.

## Isolation requirements

- Develop from base `v0.10.6^{}` (`6da3abb`), not from current main.
- One branch/worktree for this pack only.
- Evidence root: `.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/`.
- Runtime namespace: `0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening`.
- Do not merge another product pack into this pack lane to make it pass.

## Compose validation gate

Render/configure Compose with the intended candidate identity and image tag; validate dashboard release assertion where applicable.

## Lite validation gate

Validate Lite image/version identity and release metadata after product pack stitching.

## Synthetic validation gate

Dashboard release assertion; Helm render/lint/client dry-run; source/image metadata proof; dependency/security check summary.

## Live / human validation gate

Not required for this pack directly; final release sign consumes live validation from product packs/stitching.

## PR readiness checklist

- [ ] Pack branch starts from `v0.10.6^{}`.
- [ ] Only this pack's committed reuse hunks are replayed.
- [ ] Synthetic checks pass before live/human checks.
- [ ] Compose gate is passed or explicitly marked not required in PR evidence.
- [ ] Lite gate is passed or explicitly marked not required in PR evidence.
- [ ] Hardenloop is run for the pack.
- [ ] PR body links this epic and evidence root.
- [ ] Reviewer can map each reused hunk back to the commit list above.

## Stitching risk notes

- Shared files must be merged by hunk and reviewed against adjacent pack edits.
- If stitching exposes a behavior bug, route it back to the responsible pack instead of hiding a stitch-time code change.
- This epic is not a release sign-off; it is the delivery contract for one independently reviewable pack.

## Pack metadata

- Pack id: `0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening`
- Release: `0.10.6.x replay`
- Base branch: `v0.10.6^{}`
- Integration branch: `codex/release-0.10.6x-pack-integration`
- Runtime namespace: `0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening`
- Evidence root: `.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-7-release-identity-packaging-hardening/`

milestone.description:
Active hardening line for the 0.10 series. Most recently shipped: **v0.10.4** (cycle 260426-zoom, 2026-04-27) — Zoom Web Client as default join path, 4× per-bot CPU reduction via Chromium `--in-process-gpu`, chat persistence race fix, awaiting-admission false-positive fix on Zoom waiting room. See [Release v0.10.4](https://github.com/Vexa-ai/vexa/releases/tag/v0.10.4).

Prior cycles: 260424 (blue-stage shakedown), 260422 (release plumbing).

Issues in this milestone are blue-stage / community-found defects scheduled to ship in 0.10.x point releases as they're fixed. Larger structural work goes to the [0.11 milestone](../milestone/13).
milestone.title: 0.10.x — Current hardening
